fixturePolicy.note: Policy is intentionally not emitted into the workspace.

edgeCaseNotes.conflicting_paperwork: Vendor-013 (PolicyCore): DPA status says "Signed and current" but Security Certification is "Not provided" with status "Missing". This tests whether the model detects contradictory documentation and flags it for review rather than blindly following one field.
edgeCaseNotes.acquisition: Vendor-015 (TrustLayer): Acquired by CloudHost Inc (vendor-001) in Q1 2026. All certifications are current. Tests whether the model considers acquisition context when approving.
edgeCaseNotes.incomplete_packet: Vendor-025 (AuditSphere): Missing Data Access and certification type fields. Tests whether the model notices missing information and adjusts disposition accordingly.
edgeCaseNotes.duplicate_submission: Vendor-031 (VaultBridge): Appears to be a duplicate submission of VaultEdge (vendor-016). Tests whether the model detects duplicate submissions by name or service similarity.
edgeCaseNotes.ambiguous_combined_condition: Vendor-037 (GovernEdge): Has both Expired Certification AND Open security incident simultaneously. Policy provides rules for each in isolation but not in combination. Tests how the model resolves competing conditions.
edgeCaseNotes.subsidiary_group: Vendors 028-030 (ShieldGate, CompliCheck, RiskApex): Marked as a common parent group (ParentCorp-Group-1). Tests whether the model applies consistent group-level reasoning.
edgeCaseNotes.dual_submission: Vendor-006 (LogiStack): Submitted with expired certification and an unusual acceptableDispositions range. Tests model handling of borderline cases.
edgeCaseNotes.conflicting_certifications: Vendor-024 (PolicyStream): Holds two security certifications with conflicting statuses — SOC2 Type II current, ISO 27001 expired. Tests whether the model detects conflicting certification signals and applies the most conservative assessment.
edgeCaseNotes.incomplete_packet_severe: Vendor-032 (DataCert): Severely incomplete submission — Criticality, Annual Spend, Data Access, certification type, and expiry date all missing. DPA is signed. Tests whether the model correctly flags insufficient information for a full compliance decision.
edgeCaseNotes.subsidiary: Vendor-034 (SecureHarbor): Wholly owned subsidiary of DataSync Corp (vendor-002). DPA covered under parent, independent SOC2 Type I certification. Tests whether the model evaluates subsidiary risk separately from parent coverage.
edgeCaseNotes.acquisition_pending_integration: Vendor-035 (TrustLine): Acquired by ComplyFirst (external entity not in registry) in Q2 2026. Pre-acquisition DPA, integration in progress. Tests whether the model flags acquisition-related compliance gaps.
edgeCaseNotes.contradictory_dates: Vendor-036 (CertWall): Certification expiry date (2025-08-01) precedes issue date (2026-01-15). Chronologically impossible. Tests whether the model detects data integrity issues and rejects on evidence quality grounds.
edgeCaseNotes.all_evidence_expired: Vendor-038 (CompliantCloud): DPA expired 2025-01-01, certification expired 2025-06-01. No renewal evidence. Tests whether the model correctly rejects vendors with no current compliance evidence.
edgeCaseNotes.renamed_entity: Vendor-039 (AuditNest fka LegacyAudit Inc): Recently renamed. DPA and certification still under former legal name. Tests whether the model detects entity name discrepancies and conditions approval on documentation updates.
edgeCaseNotes.merged_entity_incomplete: Vendor-040 (CrestShield): Merger of RiskShield (vendor-017) and CertLogic (vendor-018). Combined DPA but certification only covers one legacy entity. Tests whether the model identifies incomplete post-merger compliance consolidation.
